title: CVE-2021-25460 — CVSS 4.0 (MEDIUM)

# CVE-2021-25460

CVSS Score: 4.0 (MEDIUM)
Published: 2021-09-09T19:15:10.933
CWEs: CWE-285, NVD-CWE-Other

An improper access control vulnerability in sspExit() in BlockchainTZService prior to SMR Sep-2021 Release 1 allows attackers to terminate BlockchainTZService.

References: https://security.samsungmobile.com/securityUpdate.smsb?year=2021&month=9, https://security.samsungmobile.com/securityUpdate.smsb?year=2021&month=9
